name: Maili Pawn Shop & Jewelry
description_short: Maili Pawn Shop & Jewelry in Miami buys and loans against jewelry, Rolex watches, and diamonds at stated top prices, operating Monday-Saturday with same-day service.
description_long:
Maili Pawn Shop & Jewelry operates as a collateral-based lending and precious metals buyer in Miami, Florida. Located at 10780 W Flagler St between SW 107th Ave and SW 2nd St, the business serves customers seeking immediate liquidity by leveraging high-value personal items. The company positions itself in the traditional pawn shop sector, where customers can either sell items outright or use them as collateral for loans.

The shop specializes in high-end jewelry purchases and collateral loans, with explicit focus on Rolex watches and diamonds. They advertise paying "top prices" on jewelry and claim to provide loans at "100% worth on your jewelry," suggesting they offer lending against collateral at face-value assessments. The business accepts multiple payment methods including cash, credit cards, debit cards, and Apple Pay, providing flexibility for both purchasing and loan transactions. Customers can visit in-person or arrange appointments by phone or email.

Maili Pawn Shop emphasizes accessibility and customer service, stating they "want everyone to feel welcomed" and inviting customers to call with questions. They maintain consistent operating hours (9 AM–6 PM Monday-Friday and Saturday 9 AM–5 PM, closed Sundays), suggesting reliable availability. The business is listed as accessible, indicating physical accommodations for customers with mobility needs.

As a pawn shop, this business serves as a short-term liquidity provider for customers with valuable items but limited access to traditional credit. However, the website provides no information about interest rates, loan terms, repayment schedules, or conditions—critical details for evaluating the actual cost and terms of their loans. The claim of "100% worth" lending is unverified and potentially misleading, as legitimate pawn operations typically lend at 40-60% of item value. No licensing, credentials, or regulatory compliance information is disclosed.
pros: Multiple payment methods accepted including Apple Pay for convenience
Accessible physical location with stated accommodation for customers with mobility needs
Offers both buying and collateral loan options for jewelry and watches
Consistent weekday and Saturday hours (9 AM–6 PM) for customer access
Specializes in high-end items (Rolex, diamonds) with stated focus on top pricing
Same-day service available without requiring advance appointment
Contact flexibility through phone, email, and in-person appointments
cons: No disclosure of interest rates, loan terms, or repayment schedules on website
Unverified claim of "100% worth" lending—typical pawn shops lend 40-60% of item value
No information about licensing, regulatory compliance, or industry certifications
No customer reviews or ratings provided on the Yahoo Local listing
Limited details on loan duration, fees, or redemption policies
best_for: Customers with high-value jewelry or watches needing immediate cash without credit qualification
People seeking to sell luxury items like Rolex watches or diamonds quickly
Those willing to use valuable personal items as collateral for short-term loans
diagnosis: Maili Pawn Shop is best for customers with valuable jewelry, watches, or diamonds who need immediate cash and are willing to sell outright or use items as collateral. The main caveat is that the website omits critical loan terms (interest rates, duration, fees), and the "100% worth" lending claim lacks verification and contradicts standard pawn industry practices—customers must call or visit to understand actual loan conditions before committing items.
services: Jewelry purchase at stated competitive prices
Collateral-based loans using jewelry as security
Collateral-based loans using luxury watches as security
Collateral-based loans using diamonds as security
Appointment scheduling by phone or email
